strategy_summary: The binary is vulnerable to a buffer overflow in the vulnerable_function, which reads 512 bytes into a 128-byte buffer. Since NX is enabled, we cannot inject shellcode directly. Instead, we will use ROP to call the callsystem function, which executes /bin/sh. We need to find gadgets to control the stack and registers, specifically to set up the arguments for system.
